data.title: Printing Limitless Brings Professional-Grade Custom Vinyl Banner Printing to Businesses Nationwide
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in both New York and Los Angeles, a renowned company called Printing Limitless is assisting businesses nationwide in finding cost-effective methods to market their products and services. With a reputation for providing tailored printing solutions, Printing Limitless aims to support enterprises in their promotional endeavors.

data.title: OpenFold Consortium Announces Major OpenFold3 Update and Public Release of Training Data for Reproducible Biomolecular AI
data.description: In Berkeley, California, researchers are making it possible to validate and iterate quickly, allowing them to transform cofolding models into scientific infrastructure that accelerates drug discovery. This advancement aims to streamline the process and enhance efficiency in research and development efforts.

data.title: Bitcoin's Cycle Is Intact, But The Bottom May Come In 2027, Analyst Says
data.description: An expert analyst, Benjamin Cowen, stated that Bitcoin's four-year market cycle continues to align with historical patterns, contradicting claims that the cycle has been broken. Despite social media speculation, Cowen emphasized that the cycle remains consistent, with major peaks historically appearing in Q4 of post-halving years. Many investors believed the cycle failed due to Bitcoin not reaching anticipated price targets or altcoins underperforming. Cowen cautions against prematurely declaring the end of the current bear market in 2026, as the cycle's timeline still corresponds to previous cycles. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Authorities dismantle SocksEscort network in crypto scam. 34 domains, 23 servers seized; $3.5M in crypto frozen with 369,000 devices hacked.
data.description: Authorities have confiscated a total of 34 domains and 23 servers, alongside freezing approximately $3.5 million in cryptocurrency, all related to SocksEscort. This proxy service has been discovered to have taken control of a staggering 369,000 devices.

data.title: Yield-backed stablecoins see rise amid US regulatory debate on crypto yield, outpacing market growth.
data.description: Stablecoins that generate yields are experiencing faster growth compared to the overall market, while US lawmakers are in disagreement about the regulation of cryptocurrency yields.

data.title: Bank of England considers stablecoins, seeks more input from crypto industry on framework adjustments.
data.description: A representative from the Bank of England has expressed openness to adjustments in their proposed stablecoin framework. However, they emphasized the crucial need for improved input from participants in the crypto industry. The bank is seeking more engagement and feedback to ensure the effectiveness and success of the framework. The official highlighted the importance of collaboration and communication with relevant stakeholders in refining the stablecoin framework.

data.title: PALM SPRINGS CITY WORKERS JOIN TEAMSTERS
data.description: In Palm Springs, California, on March 13, 2026, over 250 employees from the City of Palm Springs decided to unite with Teamsters Local 1932, showcasing a notable achievement for workers striving for increased representation. This move indicates success in public sector organizing efforts within the Coachella Valley region.

data.title: Insilico Medicine to Announce 2025 Financial Results on March 30, 2026
data.description: A biotechnology company based in CAMBRIDGE, Massachusetts, revealed on March 13, 2026, that it will publish its financial results soon. Insilico Medicine, listed on the HKEX as 3696.HK, utilizes generative artificial intelligence for drug research and advancement.

data.title: L3Harris to Present at Upcoming Investor Conference
data.description: L3Harris Technologies, listed on the NYSE as LHX, is scheduled to participate in the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in Washington on March 18 at 12:55 p.m. ET. The presentation will be given by Ken Bedingfield, President of Missile Solutions, and will be streamed live on L3Harris.com. Following the event, a recording will be accessible. L3Harris Technologies positions itself as the Trusted Disruptor in defense technology, prioritizing customers' mission-critical requirements.
